identification.title: Identification Codes
identification.description: Manage identification codes for different entity types

formats.commission: 7 characters: {prefix} + 5 digits + suffix letter (A-Z, except O)

validation.noLetterO: Code cannot contain the letter O
validation.invalidSuffix: Last character must be a letter A-Z (except O)
validation.notUnique: This code is already in use

info.endsWith: End with a letter (A-Z, except O)
info.noLetterO: No letter "O" anywhere in the code

commission.title: Commission Entities
commission.description: Entities that receive commissions use 7-character codes
